# Kory Bruce Real Estate

> Kory Bruce is a Windsor-Essex REALTOR® and Sales Representative with Results Realty Inc. Brokerage, helping first-time buyers, home buyers, and sellers make clear real estate decisions.

Kory Bruce Real Estate provides local real estate guidance for Windsor-Essex, Ontario, with a focus on buyer education, first-time home buyers, sellers, neighbourhood comparison, and practical real estate decision-making.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://korybruce.ca/): Overview of Kory Bruce Real Estate, buyer and seller guidance, service areas, real estate tools, FAQ, and contact information.

## Buyer Resources

- [Mortgage Payment Estimator](https://korybruce.ca/#mortgage-calculator): Simple tool to estimate a monthly mortgage payment.
- [Cash Needed to Buy Estimator](https://korybruce.ca/#cash-needed-estimator): Simple tool to estimate upfront cash needed for a home purchase.
- [First-Time Home Buyer Guide PDF](https://korybruce.ca/guides/windsor-first-time-home-buyer-guide-kory-bruce.pdf): Buyer guide for first-time home buyers in Windsor-Essex.

## Seller Resources

- [Seller Guide PDF](https://korybruce.ca/guides/windsor-essex-seller-guide-kory-bruce.pdf): Seller guide for Windsor-Essex homeowners preparing to sell.
- [Selling in Windsor-Essex](https://korybruce.ca/#sellers): Overview of selling guidance, preparation, pricing, marketing, and offer strategy.

## Local Real Estate Areas

- [Areas Served](https://korybruce.ca/#areas): Windsor, LaSalle, Tecumseh, Riverside, Lakeshore, Amherstburg, and Essex County.

## Contact

- [Contact Kory Bruce](https://korybruce.ca/#contact): Contact information for Kory Bruce Real Estate.
